items.title: WATCH:  Nancy Guthrie search ongoing after more than two weeks
items.description: The search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie, is entering day 16 as investigators await the results of D...

items.title: WATCH:  London police battle epidemic of phone snatching
items.description: ABC News joined undercover police as they target thieves on high-powered bikes snatching phones.

items.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights icon, dies at 84
items.description: Civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson died on Tuesday morning aged 84, according to a statement released by his family.

items.title: WATCH:  Reverend Jesse Jackson has died at age 84
items.description: Civil rights activist Reverend Jesse Jackson passed away, he was surrounded by his family.

items.title: Witkoff, Kushner set for Geneva talks on Ukraine, Iran as Trump pushes for deals
items.description: Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner -- U.S. President Donald Trump's son-in-law -- will lead American negotiators in Geneva, Switzerland.
